PROP-01b-partial2-post-001.text: Changing auction via _setAuction must not leave stale token approvals to the old auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial2-post-001.assertion: post _setAuction(newAuction): allowance(address(this), oldAuction) == 0 for all tokens

locations.note: updates s_auction to new address at line 163; does not revoke approvals from old auction contract
